articles.title: US States Banning Bitcoin as Money?!
articles.description: Central bank digital currency might be upon us soon. Secret, corrupt, cryptic, and subtle legislation is racing through state legislatures that will facilitate a WEF/UN-style CBDC rather than blocking it. This legislation will pre-emptively "ban" Bitcoin and other "cryptocurrencies" as a decentralized option to escape from this looming menace. S*** just got real and the powers that be want you under big brother's watchful eye. The question “what is money?” is quickly becoming the defining questi

Bitcoin (BTC) Targeting $10,000,000 Amid Rapid Global Crypto Adoption, According to Quant Analyst PlanB
articles.description: A rapid acceleration in Bitcoin’s pace of global adoption could catapult the top cryptocurrency to staggering new heights, according to quantitative analyst PlanB. In a series of tweets, the pseudonymous strategist says the most powerful part of Bitcoin’s adoption s-curve is around the corner. The adoption s-curve is often used to track the cumulative rate […]
